tests.title: Verify user cannot log in after account deletion is processed
preconditions: User has previously requested account deletion
steps: Enter the credentials of the deleted account
tests.expected_result: The system denies access and displays an authentication error message

tests.title: Verify receipt of email confirmation upon completion of data deletion
steps: Access the email inbox associated with the account
Search for a message from the system regarding account deletion
tests.expected_result: An email confirmation stating that the deletion is complete is present in the inbox

tests.title: Verify cancellation of data deletion request via confirmation dialog
preconditions: User has initiated the data deletion request
steps: Click the cancel or close button on the dialog
tests.expected_result: The dialog closes and no data deletion process is initiated

tests.title: Verify data deletion request is not processed if user cancels before final confirmation
steps: Navigate to the account settings page
Close the browser tab or navigate away from the page while the confirmation dialog is visible
tests.expected_result: The account remains active and no deletion process is triggered

tests.title: Verify all personal data is removed after the 30-day processing period
preconditions: User has confirmed the deletion request
30 days have passed since the request
tests.expected_result: The system indicates that the account does not exist and no personal data is accessible

notes: Regression testing for AIP-20 is covered by the email confirmation test case.
